title: Take part in ‘The Cat Walk’ and support feline welfare
description: GEORGE NEWS – Vetcare Animal Clinic is...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS – Vetcare Animal Clinic is inviting all animal lovers and fitness enthusiasts to join The Cat Walk, a 5km fun run in support of feline welfare.

The event will take place at the beautiful Garden Route Botanical Gardens on Saturday 6 September.


> The event promises a morning of fun for the whole family, including your four-legged companions!


Leashed and socialised pets are more than welcome to join in on the scenic stroll through nature.

All funds raised will go to Cat Assistance Team (CAT), a dedicated non-profit organisation committed to the welfare of cats in underprivileged areas.

Come walk, run or wag your tail for a good cause!For more information, contact Vetcare Animal Clinic on 044 873 3585 or [email protected] or follow their social media pages.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
